title: Amazon Certificate Manager Certificate
description: Represents an ACM SSL/TLS certificate with its associated metadata, domain validation, and lifecycle information.

certificateArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the certificate.

domainName.description: The fully qualified domain name for the certificate.

subjectAlternativeNames.description: One or more domain names (subject alternative names) included in the certificate.

issuer.description: The name of the certificate authority that issued the certificate.

serial.description: The serial number of the certificate.

keyAlgorithm.description: The algorithm used to generate the key pair.

createdAt.description: The time at which the certificate was requested.

issuedAt.description: The time at which the certificate was issued.

notBefore.description: The time before which the certificate is not valid.

notAfter.description: The time after which the certificate is not valid.

renewalEligibility.description: Whether the certificate is eligible for renewal.
